summary: This document serves as a patient-facing guide for the KeepMeCompany AI Intake Service, explaining how to interact with the AI phone agent for appointment requests. It outlines safety protocols, identity verification steps, and data protection measures including encryption and deletion policies. The text concludes with support contact details and version information.
